hero.tagline: Advanced aerospace systems. Battlefield technologies. Private military contracting. The future of defense is forged here.

cards.label: MORNINGSTAR DEFENSE
cards.title: Fleet Operations
cards.text: Javelins. Krakens. Idris frigates in formation. We don't ask for orbital superiority — we take it. Capital ship fleet ops, escort coordination, and force projection across every system that matters.

cards.label: LOGISTICS
cards.title: Advanced Battlefield Technologies
cards.text: Blueprinted weapons. Custom loadouts. Gear that hasn't hit the market yet. Our Logistics dept makes sure every operator hits the field with an unfair advantage. Mining ,crafting, base building, salvage.. WE DO IT ALL!

cards.label: FOG — Forward Operations Group
cards.title: Private Military Contracting
cards.text: Ship boarding. Infiltration. High-value target extraction. FOG doesn't do peacekeeping — we do results. Elite, membership-limited, and available for hire.

events.title: FOG Qualification
events.desc: CQB drills & boarding procedures. Full kit required.

events.title: Supply Run
events.desc: Stanton logistics convoy. Haulers & escorts needed.

events.title: Org Night
events.desc: Open comms. Crew up, hang out, run whatever.

events.title: Fleet Op: Siege
events.desc: Capital fleet engagement. All hands on deck.

footer.sub: Advanced Aerospace & Defense Systems Est. 2950 | Design by Anarchy
